title: senecillis mortonii
intro: Senecillis mortonii, also known as Groundsel Bush or Grindelia, is a shrubby perennial plant native to North America, particularly in the western regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Senecillis mortonii include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin irritations. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture for herbal remedies, although its use should be cautious due to potential toxicity and allergic reactions.
